creator: sobomax@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

There was a problem in ORBit, which prevented Nautilus from starting up 
properly. The problem was fixed recently, so please try to update your 
ports tree using cvsup and rebuild/reinstall all major GNOME components 
from scratch. Please keep in mind though, that the Nautilus is still 
unstable like a hell, so your mileage may vary. 

Thank you for reporting!
